channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: Trump signals he will escalate war with Iran as Tehran apologises to neighbors for strikes - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: Trump signals he will escalate war with Iran as Tehran apologises to neighbors for strikes  CNN
  2. Trump says Iran ‘will be hit very hard’ despite apology for striking neighbors  The Hill
  3. Iran war live: Trump vows ‘very hard’ strikes; Iran says will not surrender  Al Jazeera
  4. Iran's president apologizes for strikes on neighbors as missiles and drones still pound their cities  AP News
  5. Trump says U.S. will expand Iran targets after Tehran apologizes to neighbors  The Washington Post
